description_long: This cake features a large, round base with a stepped, tiered design, topped by a small, ornate decorative element resembling a flower or finial. The exterior is covered in alternating vertical stripes of brown and white, giving it a visually striking, almost geometric appearance. The lower tier is the widest, with a slightly beveled edge, while the upper tier is smaller and sits centrally atop the base. The topmost decoration is intricate and appears to be made of chocolate or fondant, adding a touch of elegance. The cake's surface is smooth and glossy, suggesting a fondant or ganache finish. There are no visible candles or additional decorations beyond the central topper.
description: A two-tiered, round cake with brown and white vertical stripes and a decorative topper, finished with a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full decorative topper and the symmetrical striped pattern on both tiers.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the beveled edge of the lower tier and the central placement of the topper.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the continuity of the striped pattern and a slight shadowing effect on the cake's surface.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the glossy finish and the layered structure of the cake, with the topper clearly visible.
